claim.summary: Lane 2 produced a local pixel-level mask/contact/depth preflight for the current Main Flow body-contact assets. The fallback actor-hand-to-receiver butt and breast edges have provisional mask-geometry support, while named left/right per-hand contact edges remain blocked because nodes 1051-1054 resolve to zero/off placeholder masks.

settings.model_effort: gpt-5.4/high default; no xhigh escalation for this mechanical evidence packaging

runtime.lane2_runtime_action: EC2 was not started or stopped; no live ComfyUI execution was performed.

artifacts.description: Reusable local QA tool that inventories active body-contact masks, connected components, overlap ratios, pressure/indent containment, occlusion overlap, and depth luma summaries.
Full pixel QA artifact with per-mask metrics, per-hand split feasibility, contact-edge metrics, and blockers.
Lane 2 response to Lane 1 summarizing fallback geometry support and named per-hand blockers.
Hand/contact review record stating that pixel QA does not accept final hand anatomy or generated-output contact validity.
Open issue for named left/right per-hand contact-pair edges blocked by zero/off placeholders.
Compact PM status report for this atomic slice with Done/In Progress/Blocked/Next Owner Action/Evidence sections.
Lane 2 work journal updated with this pixel QA slice.

checks.name: workflow_hash_binding
checks.notes: The QA artifact binds to canonical Main Flow hash 5C67A23D1F70A6E7A5687E99E58F73EA475A172B4736F32D192AB3929BC35EC9.

checks.name: mask_inventory
checks.notes: The QA pass inventoried 15 body-contact masks and 4 image/depth/normal references from C:\Comfy_UI\Input_References\main_flow\body_contact_slots.

checks.name: fallback_actor_hand_to_receiver_butt
checks.notes: Actor-contact overlap over actor is 1.0; receiver-contact overlap over contact is 0.92388479; contact zone containment by dilated actor/receiver/shadow is 0.99916814.

checks.name: fallback_actor_hand_to_receiver_breast
checks.notes: Actor-contact overlap over actor is 1.0; receiver-contact overlap over contact, containment, pressure containment, and indentation containment are all 1.0.

checks.name: named_per_hand_contact_edges
checks.notes: B.left/B.right named hand edges are blocked because character_b_left_hand_mask.png and character_b_right_hand_mask.png are zero/off placeholders.

checks.name: per_hand_split_feasibility
checks.notes: The combined actor-hand mask has 3 components but no reliable Character A/B left/right labels, so Lane 2 did not invent nonzero per-hand masks.

checks.name: actor_body_collision_qa
checks.notes: character_b_body_mask.png remains zero/off, so full actor-body collision QA is not proven.

checks.name: runtime_visual_validation
checks.notes: No live ComfyUI run or final output was reviewed; this artifact is a local mask/depth preflight only.

failure_reasons: Named per-hand contact-pair edges require same-scene nonzero left/right hand masks.
Actor body segmentation remains zero/off for full actor-body collision checks.
Runtime visual/depth interpretation and final hand anatomy acceptance still require Lane 4/Lane 5 evidence.

blockers.description: The exact per-hand mask files exist but are zero/off placeholders, so named left/right contact-pair QA is blocked.
blockers.next_action: Provide same-scene nonzero Character A/B left/right hand segmentation masks, or keep named per-hand edges inactive and rely only on actor-hand fallback mode.

blockers.description: character_b_body_mask.png remains zero/off and cannot support full actor-body collision/deformation checks.
blockers.next_action: Provide a trustworthy same-scene actor body segmentation source when full actor-body collision QA is required.

blockers.description: The mask/depth preflight has not been validated by a live current-hash Main Flow execution or generated-output hand/contact review.
blockers.next_action: Lane 4 should run current-hash runtime validation only inside an approved EC2 lease window, then Lane 5 should evaluate visual hand/contact evidence.
